UserComments.Comment: Excellent,charged again for free from Schuko both ways,love to just plug & charge,ideal for night charging,when i also need to sleep.

For Mennekes sockets do not exceed 3hrs.of continuous charging to avoid extra fees, to fully charge your battery from Mennekes socket restart charging every 3hrs.to ensure,U will pay only for electricity, not also for parking,or charge from Schuko socket for free,without authentication & for unlimited time,if U r patient enough to be happy with 6A,but free 6A.There is also food shop across the street, park nearby & restaurants in town center.Enjoy.Live long & prosper.

UsageCost: Free charging from Schuko socket without authentication;Payed by EVN tariff with RFID authentication for Mennekes sockets.

AddressInfo.Title: EVN Public Charging Station (AC).
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Unlimited public access, 2 dedicated parking places, more places @ the parking lot, with extension cord U can charge 3 vehicles in parallel,if the adjacent parking place is free,or if the 3rd vehicle is a bike or a scooter, U can charge it on the sidewalk, the Schuko socket is facing to the sidewalk.

Connections.Comments: Payed by EVN tariff via RFID card.

GeneralComments: Safe place,just neighboring with the police department, park & food-shop nearby.
